get.description: Return current session status, recent files, and setup check.

post.description: Load a KDF file into the global model state.
Re-parse the KDF from disk.
Unload the current model.

get.description: Return model summary, prerequisites, and project info.

post.description: Save the in-memory model back to its source .kdf file.
Save project metadata (COM, PRJ, ENG) to the active KDF file.

get.description: Return list of pipe names for dropdowns.

post.description: Copy fluid properties from one pipe to multiple others.

get.description: Get pipe criteria data for the criteria table.

post.description: Apply criteria to pipe SIZ parameters.
Auto-predict state and criteria for all pipes.
Save or clear a justification for a pipe criteria violation.
Apply PMS data from Excel or JSON file.
Apply HMB data from Excel or JSON file.

get.description: Return list of available global settings with saved selections.

post.description: Apply selected global settings to the model.
Center all elements on the page.
Snap near-orthogonal connections and align to grid.

get.description:
Check KORF Excel source status (presence + staleness).

Returns the detected KORF Excel path and whether it is stale
(i.e., the KDF has been modified since the Excel was generated).

post.description:
Generate a single-model Excel report.

Uses ``mode`` to select the reporter:
- ``"single"`` (default): PykorfReporter via KDF data only.
- ``"multi"``: KorfReporter via auto-detected KORF Excel alongside the KDF.
  Requires the KORF Excel file to exist and be up-to-date.
Export model to Excel file.
Import model parameters from Excel file.

Generate batch report across multiple KDF files in a folder.

Uses ``mode`` to select the reporter:
- ``"single"`` (default): PykorfReporter per KDF.
- ``"multi"``: KorfReporter per KDF (auto-detects KORF Excel alongside each KDF).

When ``validate_only=True`` and ``mode="multi"``, scans for KORF Excel
files and returns which KDFs are missing/stale without generating.

get.description: Return directory listing for the path browser widget.

post.description: Pin a folder for quick access in the path browser.
Unpin a folder from quick access.

get.description: Return Document Register configuration and DB status.
Search query entries by document number.
Search query entries by name or path.

post.description: Force rebuild the Document Register database from Excel.
Save Document Register configuration.
Add a new SharePoint override.
Edit an existing SharePoint override.
Delete a SharePoint override.
Toggle skip SharePoint override validation.
Validate and save a license key.
Save Document Register configuration and rebuild DB if Excel path changed.

get.description: Get references store for the active model.

post.description: Save basis, remarks, and hold items.
Add or update a reference entry.
Update an existing reference by ID.
Delete a reference by ID.
Create .url shortcut files in the reference/ folder.

Resolve a SharePoint URL to its local OneDrive-synced path.

Uses user-configured SharePoint overrides first, then falls back to
OneDrive registry sync roots for automatic conversion.

Args:
    req: Request containing the SharePoint URL to resolve.

Returns:
    OkResponse with success=True and message=local_path if resolved,
    or success=False with error message if resolution failed.

ProjectInfoRequiredResponse.title: ProjectInfoRequiredResponse
ProjectInfoRequiredResponse.description:
Response when project info is incomplete and needs to be filled.

Returned by operations when project info check fails. Frontend should
prompt user with the provided smart_defaults and current project_info.
